name: Beatrix
description: __Race:__ Elf Beatrix is the champion of the God of War Tournament. ~!She is presumed to be the long lost aunt of [Alpha](https://anilist.co/character/162246/Alpha).!~ (Source: To Be a Power in the Shadows! Wiki)

name: Iska
description: Iska is the main protagonist of the series. He is the current wielder of the Astral Swords and is determined to end what he considers a pointless war. He was the youngest Saint Disciple to ever receive the title; but after releasing a "witch" from captivity, he was stripped of his rank and imprisoned for life. Circumstances around the war against the Nebulis Sovereignty have led to his release, but his goals haven't changed. Iska has a moral code that doesn’t discriminate, even if a supposed ene

name: Lapis Lazuli
description: __Hardness:__ 5 A gem that was taken to the moon before the beginning of the story, leaving only their head behind on Earth. Lapis was in charge of the library, a position now taken up by their former partner [Ghost Quartz](https://anilist.co/character/128723/Ghost-Quartz). Lapis was clever, confident, and charming, with keen observation and great deductive thinking skills. [Euclase](https://anilist.co/character/123391/Euclase) remarks that although Lapis was extremely smart and pleasant to talk

name: Luluco
description: A thirteen-year-old student living with her father in Ogikubo. Her one true wish is to lead a normal life despite her odd living place. When her father accidentally freezes himself and falls into pieces, she brings him to his workplace where she is assigned the role of a space officer against her will.

name: Moro no Kimi
description: Years ago, Moro found two adults chopping down the animal's forest. Moro was furious, and she was about to attack them when they threw their baby at her feet as they fled. That baby was then named San, and raised by her. As the years went by, Moro taught San the wolf life, how to run like one, and even act like one. When "The Iron Works" was established, Moro had a tendency to tell San to attack the villagers, since they were defiling the forest. One rainy day, Moro attacked the villagers, while

name: Riko Amanai
description: Riko Amanai is a student at Renchoku Girls' Junior High and the designated Star Plasma Vessel for Master Tengen's merger in 2006. ~!She was later killed by Toji Fushiguro in the same arc.!~
mediaTitles: JUJUTSU KAISEN: Hidden Inventory / Premature Death – The Movie
searchTerms: JUJUTSU KAISEN: Hidden Inventory / Premature Death – The Movie

name: Sougo Osaka
description: __Height:__ 175 cm Sougo Osaka is a very calm and soothing, if sometimes unsure, presence most of the time. He’s very reserved, though, and prioritizes being polite and following the order of things over what he himself may desire. However, he does have a switch, and if you press it Sougo very quickly turns into one of the most menacing members of IDOLiSH7.

name: Yachiyo
description: Yachiyo is a hardworking hotelier robot working at the hotel “Gingarou”. Serving in an acting manager role, she upholds her duties with quiet determination even after humanity vanished from Earth. Ever hopeful, she awaits her owner’s return and dreams of the day when humanity comes back as guests. Ever so serious and dedicated, she approaches her work with unwavering determination.

name: Aleksander
description: A police officer in Sashenka's police station who by chance meets Emma, who accidentally hits him with her cane. It's implied he's Russian. ~!The two eventually become lovers.!~ He is not a morning person. He likes reading, Assam tea and smokes Chesterfield. He has a half sister that works at a cabaret.

name: Kazuomi Ooga
description: __Height:__ 171 cm (5'7") Kazuomi Ooga looks like a flashy student, but he has the best grades among the boys in his class. He has a pure side and is not interested in romance. He is not athletic. ~!Kazuomi greatly respects his older brother, who had previously shouldered the responsibilities of providing for the family. Even after Takaomi became a NEET, Kazuomi simply felt it is now his old turn to be responsible and let his brother time to rest. The piercing Kazuomi got from his brother was on

name: Kirika Akatsuki
description: Kirika is another one of the mysterious Symphogear users. Although she has a very straightforward, cheerful, and cooperative personality, she harbors a shadowy past as one of the "Receptor Children" who was treated as an observation subject at a certain research facility along with Maria, Serena, Shirabe and others. The bonds between Kirika and her friends are so strong that she feels no fear from fighting against the entire world. ~!She cares very much for her teammates and is willing to do wha

name: Nice Nature
description: __Height:__ 157 cm

name: Papika
description: A mysterious girl who appears in front of Cocona. She's always bright and active, thirsting for adventure, along with having nearly no fear. She is also proficient at riding a hoverboard, often surfing the skies. After becoming friends with Cocona, Papika insists on returning to Pure Illusion for more adventures. ~!In the past, she was referred to as, "Papikana," when she was partners with Mimi.!~

name: Ryou Yoake
description: A member of the ReLife research team, and the person in charge of Arata's experiment. He's always cheerful, but has a cunning personality. He takes the form of a high schooler and supports Arata as a classmate.

name: Ako Udagawa
description: __Height:__ 148 cm (4'10") __Instruments:__ DW (Drum Workshop) Collector Series: Pure Maple five-piece drum set Ako is a student at Haneoka Girls' High School and Roselia's drummer. She admires Yukina and her older sister Tomoe, and is the best friend of Rinko, whom she calls "Rin-rin". Ako has chuunibyou tendencies, and has illusions of grandeur and magical powers. Rinko suspects this is the result from her playing online games frequently. She enjoys playing the role while keeping a realistic m

name: Ayano Kimishima
description: Ayano is an expressionless maid of the Suou household. She's the sort of devoted servant who has boundless love for her master, and she's dedicated herself to serving [Yuki](https://anilist.co/character/243404). She often has no presence and vanishes into thin air. ~!Ayano used to originally serve Masachika. She still has boundless love for him and treats him as her master too.!~

description: She is a classmate of Karen Tendou from class 2-A at Otobuki High School and a member of a non-school recognized gamer appreciation group together with Keita Amano and Tasuku Uehara. Chiaki is a shy girl and very reclusive. She did not seem to care about her looks at first until Keita and Tasuku came into her life. name: Kenkaya
description: __Height:__ 200 cm __Estimated Prison Sentence:__ 348 years The Brawler is pure and straightforward. He believes that power is everything and doesn't care if he dies as long as he can fight strong enemies. He often fist bumps people and his favorite food is meat.

name: Mizuki Usami
description: A second year middle school student, and a member of the art club. She's the heroine of the story, and has relatively fewer problems. She tends to display a calm and outgoing expression but may turn violent at times.

name: Natsuhiko Hyuuga
description: Natsuhiko Hyuuga is a 2nd year student at Kamome Academy's High School division. He is a member of the school's broadcasting club.
